packageRules.description: GitHub Actions are owned by Dependabot here (.github/dependabot.yml), which understands this repo's SHA-pin + version-comment shape and keeps both halves in lockstep; the actions-pinned-gate enforces it. The org Renovate preset (config:recommended) would otherwise enable Renovate's github-actions manager too, double-managing actions. Disable it so Dependabot stays the sole owner; Renovate owns npm currency (dependency dashboard).
